name: Pineapple-Lemon Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the pineapple and reserve the juice.
2. Combine the reserved juice with garlic, cornstarch, Worcestershire sauce, mustard, and rosemary in a bowl.
3. Arrange the chicken pieces in a shallow casserole dish, skin side up. Sprinkle with salt.
4. Broil until the chicken is browned.
5. Stir the sauce mixture to combine.
6. Pour the sauce over the chicken.
7. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 30 minutes.
8. Arrange the pineapple and lemon slices around the chicken.
9. Spoon any remaining sauce over all.
10. Continue baking for an additional 5 minutes.
11. Makes 6 servings, with each serving containing approximately 229 calories.
